title: Liases Foras is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Liases Foras is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!
